scripts.build: test -f tracker.ts || (echo 'Missing tracker.ts. Copy tracker.ts.example to tracker.ts before building.' && exit 1); esbuild tracker.ts --bundle --tree-shaking=true --minify --mangle-props='^_[^_]' --format=iife --platform=browser --target=es2015 --outfile=dist/tracker.js && tsc --noEmit
